title: LNDFi - Rekt
relevance_summary: Admin privileges exploit via contract modification

prevention.rule: Block any tx that modifies access control for critical functions
prevention.trigger: MODIFY_ACCESS_CONTROL -> addPoolAdmin() && call to transferUnderlyingTo() in same tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that modifies access control for critical functions
summary: LNDFi suffered a $1.18 million loss due to a contract modification that granted admin privileges, allowing the attacker to drain funds. A critical access control change was made 41 days before the exploit, providing the admin with the ability to call functions that should have been restricted.
